name: /prompt-ab refuses to compare two versions when the prompt id does not exist
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" no-such-prompt v1.0.0 v1.1.0 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_prompt_id' err.txt && grep -q 'no-such-prompt' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
